description: SKILL.md geometry and camera reference sections -- per-geometry documentation (description, slots, when to use, visual effect), per-camera-path documentation (description, motion type, compatible geometries, when to use). At minimum covers stage and tunnel geometries in detail. Per Section 4.9.
notes: Tier 5 integration. High priority. OBJ-056 (manifest generation via Claude API) depends on this. Spec covers full sections for tunnel/canyon/flyover geometries and lateral_track/tunnel_push_forward/flyover_glide cameras. Stubs for unverified geometries and cameras. Includes D9 compatibility resolution rule for lateral_track/canyon asymmetry.
